failedAssertions.reason: Frontend category filter mismatch: App.tsx localTiles only accepts 'local'|'community'|'oss' categories. Technology-category radars route to Π lane instead of μ lane. MuThreadCard with leverage/proximity indicators is implemented and unit-tested, but receives no tiles.

Two issues: (1) Category filter mismatch prevents thread cards from rendering in μ lane (same root cause as VAL-MU-002). (2) MuThreadCard component lacks per-card action suggestions — shows signal details, source badges, and indicators but no action suggestion list.

Signal→thread→API pipeline works correctly (5 signals, 5 threads, live snapshot all present). Frontend category filter mismatch: 'technology' category routes to Π lane instead of μ lane. MuLane receives empty tiles array.

rootCauseAnalysis.cause: Frontend localTiles category filter too restrictive
rootCauseAnalysis.description: App.tsx filters radar tiles into lanes by category. localTiles only accepts 'local'|'community'|'oss' categories, but 'technology' category radars (containing local AI community data) route to connectionTiles (Π lane) instead. Fix: add 'technology' to localTiles filter, OR use a broader category matching approach.

MuThreadCard component shows title, signal count, proximity/leverage/time-to-act indicators, leverage bar, source badges, and expandable signal details, but has no action suggestions list per-card. The Action Feed component (lane-level) shows action suggestions, but they are not embedded in individual thread cards as the assertion specifies.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated category filter mismatch knowledge for μ lane testing — 'technology' not in localTiles filter
